data.title: Skimmer and Heritage Pool Supply Announce Strategic Partnership to Modernize Pool Industry Operations
data.description: In Austin, Texas, the initial phase of the Skimmer-Heritage merger allows Skimmer users to seamlessly incorporate Heritage product data into their accounts. This connection ensures that product details are current and precise, empowering pool professionals to handle products, expenses, and pricing more effectively. This integration allows Skimmer clients to synchronize Heritage items into their accounts, providing real-time updates and access to comprehensive product descriptions. This enhancement enables users to maintain accurate records and make informed decisions confidently.

data.title: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. Declares First Quarter 2026 Common Share Dividend of U.S.$0.0650 (C$0.0888), and Declares First Quarter 2026 Preferred Share Dividends
data.description: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. ("AQN") based in Oakville, Ontario, has declared dividends for its common and preferred shares. The approved dividend for common shares is US$0.0650 per share, payable on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 31, 2026. This dividend covers the period from January 1, 2026, to March 31, 2026. Registered shareholders have the option to receive the dividend in Canadian dollars. AQN's board of directors sanctioned this decision. The company's common shares trade on the TSX under the symbols AQN, AQN.PR.A, AQN.PR.D, and on the NYSE as AQN.

data.title: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (AQN) based in Oakville, Ontario, announced their financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The net earnings for the quarter amounted to $29.4 million, equal to $0.04 per common share. Adjusted net earnings for the same period were reported at $47.2 million, translating to $0.06 per common share. For the full year ending on December 31, 2025, the net earnings totaled $208.0 million, or $0.27 per common share. Adjusted net earnings for the same period were disclosed as $258.8 million, or $0.34 per common share. These figures show a significant increase in earnings compared to the previous period.

data.title: China sets GDP growth target for 2026, eyeing stronger results
data.description: In news from Beijing dated March 6, 2026, China SCIO has announced that China has established an economic growth goal of 4.5% to 5% for the current year. The government has committed to pursuing improved outcomes to achieve a balance between structural adjustments, risk mitigation, and long-term development objectives.

data.title: Bluejay Diagnostics Provides Corporate Update and 2026 Strategic Outlook
data.description: In ACTON, Massachusetts, on March 6, 2026, Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. (NASDAQ: BJDX), a healthcare company focusing on quick near-patient tests for enhanced critical care patient results, shared a corporate update. The update showcased recent advancements and outlined the Company's strategic direction up to 2026.

data.title: FTAI Aviation Announces CFO Transition
data.description: In New York on March 6, 2026, FTAI Aviation Ltd. (NASDAQ: FTAI) revealed Nicholas McAleese as the new Chief Financial Officer and Michael Hazan as the Chief Accounting Officer. The appointments are effective immediately.

data.title: SABINE ROYALTY TRUST ANNOUNCES MONTHLY CASH DISTRIBUTION FOR MARCH 2026
data.description: Argent Trust Company, in its role as Trustee of the Sabine Royalty Trust (NYSE: SBR), announced a cash distribution of $0.286230 per unit for its beneficial interest holders. The payment is scheduled for March 30, 2026, and will be disbursed to unit holders listed on record as of March 16.
